query:
-- Check the breakdown of not_found contacts by role bucket to understand what was culled
SELECT roleBucket, COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentStatus = 'not_found'
GROUP BY roleBucket
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
